ranked_movies.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
ranked_movies.reason: Heavily discussed for its record-breaking box office opening, overtaking 'It' as the biggest horror movie debut. Described as the 'Endgame' of the Conjuring universe, generating significant cultural buzz and event-level viewership.

ranked_movies.title: It
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned as a benchmark for horror box office success, holding the opening record for 8 years. Praised for its massive cultural impact and financial performance.

ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended as a top-tier horror film with a perfect ending. Cited for its masterful blend of mystery, paranoia, and practical effects, making it a gateway film for non-horror fans.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Widely regarded as one of the best horror films of the 21st century. Noted for its intense atmosphere, family drama, and deeply unsettling scenes that leave a lasting impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as a film that 'terrified a generation' and redefined horror for many. Praised for its atmosphere, iconic villain, and significant cultural impact in the early 2000s.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited for its intense claustrophobia, brutal ending, and ability to induce genuine nightmares. Discussed as a top horror film of the century.

ranked_movies.title: Sinister
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its profoundly scary and unsettling Super 8 film sequences and effective soundtrack. Described as leaving viewers cold and feeling like they weren't supposed to be watching.

ranked_movies.title: The Wailing
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as a phenomenal and terrifying film, often slept on but considered worth the watch. Noted for its length and complexity, but ultimately rewarding.

ranked_movies.title: 28 Days Later
ranked_movies.reason: Credited with changing the concept of zombies and inventing the 'infected' trope. Recognized as a groundbreaking and terrifying film that redefined the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Witch
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its unsettling, oppressive atmosphere and lingering dread. Considered Robert Eggers' best work and a standout horror film of the century.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a 'comfort horror watch' with a fantastic soundtrack and unique setting. Loved for its original concept and enduring appeal.

ranked_movies.title: Paranormal Activity
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed for its effective found-footage style and specific, chilling scenes that serve as 'nightmare fuel'. Noted for its cultural impact and multiple endings.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently referenced for its iconic shots, quotes, and status as a horror masterpiece. The poster shot of Father Merrin's arrival is a favorite single shot for many.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in a political context, but its iconic chestburster scene is highlighted as one of the most memorable single shots in horror history.

ranked_movies.title: Halloween
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed for its simple, effective scares and iconic ending. The image of Michael Myers is used as a prime example of classic, straightforward horror.

ranked_movies.title: Hellraiser
ranked_movies.reason: Cited for its terrifying quotes, particularly 'Jesus wept,' which left viewers paralyzed and disturbed. Recognized for its unique and brutal mythology.

ranked_movies.title: Drag Me to Hell
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its brutally unfair and painful ending, which subverts expectations of deserved fate. The entity's cruelty is compared to folklore from Latin America and Asia.

ranked_movies.title: Saint Maud
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its shocking, split-second ending that changes the entire film. The final shot is a favorite for many due to its impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Others
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a top choice for non-horror fans due to its quality as a 'world-class ghost story' that happens to be a great movie overall.

ranked_movies.title: Evil Dead 2
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a fun, gateway horror film and noted for having the 'best closure' via Army of Darkness. Described as the most fun horror movie.
